Ten Steps Towards Happiness

pieterh wrote on 29 Sep 2015 09:57

Today, I'm going to explain ten simple steps you can take towards being happier, and making those around you happier. It takes no money and no magic. Just a shift in how you see the world, yourself, and others. As the 14th Dalai Lama said, "Happiness… comes from your own actions."

1. Invest in your senses

Your body and mind need a good diet. Make your own food, and make it tasty. Take photographs you find beautiful. Play music that excites you. Wear clothes that feel nice. Walk through the city at night, in the rain. Feel the texture of your life, with all your senses.

2. Do things you are bad at

Learning makes us feel alive. Challenge yourself, and keep proving you can learn. Learn to juggle, to hold your breath underwater for longer, to solve a Rubik's cube. Learn to play music and play for yourself. Learn to paint and draw.

3. Enjoy other people

Nothing makes us happier than other people. Take the time to talk to people you cross paths with. Be nice, chat, smile. If you live far from other people, move to be closer. If you drive a lot, change your life so you can walk and cycle. Go out and mingle.

4. Be part of bigger things

Being part of bigger things makes us feel valued. Find communities and projects to be part of. Start your own. It could be online or in the real world. Even the smallest contributions can make a difference to someone. Be precious to strangers.

5. Finish your projects

A sense of achievement gives us hope and confidence. Write down your life's accomplishments. Even small ones. Now keep this list up to date. Every year, think of what you've achieved. Finish your projects and move on to new ones.

6. Get rid of bad actors

Nothing can make us more miserable than other people. Read "The Psychopath Code," and learn to recognize bad actors. When someone is a source of misery, remove them from your life. Whether it takes a day or a year, make this a project, and finish it.

7. Ground your emotions

To be happy you must deal with negative emotions. Learn to recognize these in yourself, and deal with them. Anger, self-pity, jealousy, fear, hate, loneliness… set them aside, and let happiness take their place. If you drink to relax, cut it out.

8. Revalue your time

Stop wasting your time on commuting, boring jobs, meetings, TV. Do only things that you feel are worthwhile, with people you like. If this means a cut in income, so be it. Be the person you really want to be. Don't take it all too seriously, we all die.

9. Travel light

Material possessions are more often a burden than a pleasure. Give away or sell anything you own that does not make you happy. Do not let your possessions define you. We live in a world of plenty. That means you can own less, not more.

10. Want nothing, accept everything

Above all, explore the world without desire or demand, and be tolerant of whatever happens. Most people are nice, and even the others teach us. When you want nothing, you cannot be disappointed. When you accept everything, you will see beauty in every moment.

sentences.en: Ten Steps Towards Happiness
sentences.zh: 迈向幸福的十步

blocks.html_en: pieterh wrote on 29 Sep 2015 09:57

sentences.en: pieterh wrote on 29 Sep 2015 09:57

blocks.html_en: Today, I'm going to explain ten simple steps you can take towards being happier, and making those around you happier. It takes no money and no magic. Just a shift in how you see the world, yourself, and others. As the 14th Dalai Lama said, "Happiness… comes from your own actions."

sentences.en: Today, I'm going to explain ten simple steps you can take towards being happier, and making those around you happier.
sentences.zh: 今天，我将解释十个简单的步骤，你可以采取这些步骤来变得更快乐，并让你周围的人更快乐。

sentences.en: It takes no money and no magic.
sentences.zh: 它不需要金钱，也不需要魔法。

sentences.en: Just a shift in how you see the world, yourself, and others.
sentences.zh: 只是你看待世界、自己和他人的方式发生了转变。

sentences.en: As the 14th Dalai Lama said, "Happiness…
sentences.zh: 正如第十四世达赖喇嘛所说：“幸福……

sentences.en: comes from your own actions."
sentences.zh: 来自你自己的行动。”

sentences.en: Invest in your senses
sentences.zh: 投资你的感官

blocks.html_en: Your body and mind need a good diet. Make your own food, and make it tasty. Take photographs you find beautiful. Play music that excites you. Wear clothes that feel nice. Walk through the city at night, in the rain. Feel the texture of your life, with all your senses.

sentences.en: Your body and mind need a good diet.
sentences.zh: 您的身体和精神需要良好的饮食。

sentences.en: Make your own food, and make it tasty.
sentences.zh: 自己做菜，并把它做得美味。

sentences.en: Take photographs you find beautiful.
sentences.zh: 拍摄您认为美丽的照片。

sentences.en: Play music that excites you.
sentences.zh: 播放让您兴奋的音乐。

sentences.en: Wear clothes that feel nice.
sentences.zh: 穿感觉不错的衣服。

sentences.en: Walk through the city at night, in the rain.
sentences.zh: 晚上，冒着雨，漫步在这座城市。

sentences.en: Feel the texture of your life, with all your senses.
sentences.zh: 用你所有的感官感受你生活的质感。

blocks.html_en: 2. Do things you are bad at

sentences.en: Do things you are bad at
sentences.zh: 做你不擅长的事情

blocks.html_en: Learning makes us feel alive. Challenge yourself, and keep proving you can learn. Learn to juggle, to hold your breath underwater for longer, to solve a Rubik's cube. Learn to play music and play for yourself. Learn to paint and draw.

sentences.en: Learning makes us feel alive.
sentences.zh: 学习让我们感到自己还活着。

sentences.en: Challenge yourself, and keep proving you can learn.
sentences.zh: 挑战自己，不断证明你可以学习。

sentences.en: Learn to juggle, to hold your breath underwater for longer, to solve a Rubik's cube.
sentences.zh: 学习变戏法、在水下屏住呼吸更长时间、解魔方。

sentences.en: Learn to play music and play for yourself.
sentences.zh: 学习演奏音乐并为自己演奏。

sentences.en: Learn to paint and draw.
sentences.zh: 学习绘画和绘画。

sentences.en: Enjoy other people
sentences.zh: 享受别人的乐趣

blocks.html_en: Nothing makes us happier than other people. Take the time to talk to people you cross paths with. Be nice, chat, smile. If you live far from other people, move to be closer. If you drive a lot, change your life so you can walk and cycle. Go out and mingle.

sentences.en: Nothing makes us happier than other people.
sentences.zh: 没有什么比其他人更让我们快乐。

sentences.en: Take the time to talk to people you cross paths with.
sentences.zh: 花时间与你遇到的人交谈。

sentences.en: Be nice, chat, smile.
sentences.zh: 保持友善，聊天，微笑。

sentences.en: If you live far from other people, move to be closer.
sentences.zh: 如果您住的地方离其他人较远，请搬到离其他人近一些的地方。

sentences.en: If you drive a lot, change your life so you can walk and cycle.
sentences.zh: 如果您经常开车，请改变您的生活，以便可以步行和骑自行车。

sentences.en: Go out and mingle.
sentences.zh: 出去交往。

sentences.en: Be part of bigger things
sentences.zh: 成为更大事情的一部分

blocks.html_en: Being part of bigger things makes us feel valued. Find communities and projects to be part of. Start your own. It could be online or in the real world. Even the smallest contributions can make a difference to someone. Be precious to strangers.

sentences.en: Being part of bigger things makes us feel valued.
sentences.zh: 参与更大的事情让我们感到被重视。

sentences.en: Find communities and projects to be part of.
sentences.zh: 寻找要参与的社区和项目。

sentences.en: Start your own.
sentences.zh: 开始你自己的。

sentences.en: It could be online or in the real world.
sentences.zh: 它可以在网上，也可以在现实世界中。

sentences.en: Even the smallest contributions can make a difference to someone.
sentences.zh: 即使是最小的贡献也可以为某人带来改变。

sentences.en: Be precious to strangers.
sentences.zh: 对陌生人要珍惜。

sentences.en: Finish your projects
sentences.zh: 完成你的项目

blocks.html_en: A sense of achievement gives us hope and confidence. Write down your life's accomplishments. Even small ones. Now keep this list up to date. Every year, think of what you've achieved. Finish your projects and move on to new ones.

sentences.en: A sense of achievement gives us hope and confidence.
sentences.zh: 成就感给我们带来希望和信心。

sentences.en: Write down your life's accomplishments.
sentences.zh: 写下你一生的成就。

sentences.en: Even small ones.
sentences.zh: 即使是很小的。

sentences.en: Now keep this list up to date.
sentences.zh: 现在请更新此列表。

sentences.en: Every year, think of what you've achieved.
sentences.zh: 每年，想想你所取得的成就。

sentences.en: Finish your projects and move on to new ones.
sentences.zh: 完成你的项目并继续新的项目。

sentences.en: Get rid of bad actors
sentences.zh: 摆脱不良演员

blocks.html_en: Nothing can make us more miserable than other people. Read "The Psychopath Code," and learn to recognize bad actors. When someone is a source of misery, remove them from your life. Whether it takes a day or a year, make this a project, and finish it.

sentences.en: Nothing can make us more miserable than other people.
sentences.zh: 没有什么比其他人更让我们痛苦的了。

sentences.en: Read "The Psychopath Code," and learn to recognize bad actors.
sentences.zh: 阅读《精神病患者守则》，学会识别不良行为者。

sentences.en: When someone is a source of misery, remove them from your life.
sentences.zh: 当某人成为痛苦的根源时，请将其从你的生活中移除。

sentences.en: Whether it takes a day or a year, make this a project, and finish it.
sentences.zh: 不管需要一天还是一年，把它当作一个项目，然后完成它。

sentences.en: Ground your emotions
sentences.zh: 扎根你的情绪

blocks.html_en: To be happy you must deal with negative emotions. Learn to recognize these in yourself, and deal with them. Anger, self-pity, jealousy, fear, hate, loneliness… set them aside, and let happiness take their place. If you drink to relax, cut it out.

sentences.en: To be happy you must deal with negative emotions.
sentences.zh: 为了快乐，你必须处理负面情绪。

sentences.en: Learn to recognize these in yourself, and deal with them.
sentences.zh: 学会认识自己的这些问题，并处理它们。

sentences.en: Anger, self-pity, jealousy, fear, hate, loneliness…
sentences.zh: 愤怒、自怜、嫉妒、恐惧、仇恨、孤独……

sentences.en: set them aside, and let happiness take their place.
sentences.zh: 把它们放在一边，让幸福取代它们。

sentences.en: If you drink to relax, cut it out.
sentences.zh: 如果你喝酒是为了放松，那就戒掉吧。

sentences.en: Revalue your time
sentences.zh: 重新评估你的时间

blocks.html_en: Stop wasting your time on commuting, boring jobs, meetings, TV. Do only things that you feel are worthwhile, with people you like. If this means a cut in income, so be it. Be the person you really want to be. Don't take it all too seriously, we all die.

sentences.en: Stop wasting your time on commuting, boring jobs, meetings, TV.
sentences.zh: 别再把时间浪费在通勤、无聊的工作、会议、电视上。

sentences.en: Do only things that you feel are worthwhile, with people you like.
sentences.zh: 只和你喜欢的人一起做你觉得有价值的事情。

sentences.en: If this means a cut in income, so be it.
sentences.zh: 如果这意味着收入减少，那就这样吧。

sentences.en: Be the person you really want to be.
sentences.zh: 成为你真正想成为的人。

sentences.en: Don't take it all too seriously, we all die.
sentences.zh: 别把这一切看得太严重，我们都会死。

sentences.en: Travel light
sentences.zh: 轻装出行

blocks.html_en: Material possessions are more often a burden than a pleasure. Give away or sell anything you own that does not make you happy. Do not let your possessions define you. We live in a world of plenty. That means you can own less, not more.

sentences.en: Material possessions are more often a burden than a pleasure.
sentences.zh: 物质财富更多时候是一种负担，而不是一种乐趣。

sentences.en: Give away or sell anything you own that does not make you happy.
sentences.zh: 放弃或出售你拥有的任何不让你快乐的东西。

sentences.en: Do not let your possessions define you.
sentences.zh: 不要让你的财产定义你。

sentences.en: We live in a world of plenty.
sentences.zh: 我们生活在一个物质丰富的世界。

sentences.en: That means you can own less, not more.
sentences.zh: 这意味着你可以拥有更少，而不是更多。

sentences.en: Want nothing, accept everything
sentences.zh: 什么都不想要，接受一切

blocks.html_en: Above all, explore the world without desire or demand, and be tolerant of whatever happens. Most people are nice, and even the others teach us. When you want nothing, you cannot be disappointed. When you accept everything, you will see beauty in every moment.

sentences.en: Above all, explore the world without desire or demand, and be tolerant of whatever happens.
sentences.zh: 最重要的是，在没有欲望或要求的情况下探索世界，并对发生的任何事情保持宽容。

sentences.en: Most people are nice, and even the others teach us.
sentences.zh: 大多数人都很友善，甚至其他人也教我们。

sentences.en: When you want nothing, you cannot be disappointed.
sentences.zh: 当你什么都不想要的时候，你就不会失望。

sentences.en: When you accept everything, you will see beauty in every moment.
sentences.zh: 当你接受一切的时候，你就会在每一刻看到美丽。

迈向幸福的十步

皮特 写于 2015年9月29日 09:57

今天，我将解释十个简单的步骤，你可以采取这些步骤来变得更快乐，并让你周围的人更快乐。 它不需要金钱，也不需要魔法。 只是你看待世界、自己和他人的方式发生了转变。 正如第十四世达赖喇嘛所说：“幸福…… 来自你自己的行动。”

1. 投资你的感官

您的身体和精神需要良好的饮食。 自己做菜，并把它做得美味。 拍摄您认为美丽的照片。 播放让您兴奋的音乐。 穿感觉不错的衣服。 晚上，冒着雨，漫步在这座城市。 用你所有的感官感受你生活的质感。

2. 做你不擅长的事情

学习让我们感到自己还活着。 挑战自己，不断证明你可以学习。 学习变戏法、在水下屏住呼吸更长时间、解魔方。 学习演奏音乐并为自己演奏。 学习绘画和绘画。

3. 享受别人的乐趣

没有什么比其他人更让我们快乐。 花时间与你遇到的人交谈。 保持友善，聊天，微笑。 如果您住的地方离其他人较远，请搬到离其他人近一些的地方。 如果您经常开车，请改变您的生活，以便可以步行和骑自行车。 出去交往。

4. 成为更大事情的一部分

参与更大的事情让我们感到被重视。 寻找要参与的社区和项目。 开始你自己的。 它可以在网上，也可以在现实世界中。 即使是最小的贡献也可以为某人带来改变。 对陌生人要珍惜。

5. 完成你的项目

成就感给我们带来希望和信心。 写下你一生的成就。 即使是很小的。 现在请更新此列表。 每年，想想你所取得的成就。 完成你的项目并继续新的项目。

6. 摆脱不良演员

没有什么比其他人更让我们痛苦的了。 阅读《精神病患者守则》，学会识别不良行为者。 当某人成为痛苦的根源时，请将其从你的生活中移除。 不管需要一天还是一年，把它当作一个项目，然后完成它。

7. 扎根你的情绪

为了快乐，你必须处理负面情绪。 学会认识自己的这些问题，并处理它们。 愤怒、自怜、嫉妒、恐惧、仇恨、孤独…… 把它们放在一边，让幸福取代它们。 如果你喝酒是为了放松，那就戒掉吧。

8. 重新评估你的时间

别再把时间浪费在通勤、无聊的工作、会议、电视上。 只和你喜欢的人一起做你觉得有价值的事情。 如果这意味着收入减少，那就这样吧。 成为你真正想成为的人。 别把这一切看得太严重，我们都会死。

9. 轻装出行

物质财富更多时候是一种负担，而不是一种乐趣。 放弃或出售你拥有的任何不让你快乐的东西。 不要让你的财产定义你。 我们生活在一个物质丰富的世界。 这意味着你可以拥有更少，而不是更多。

10. 什么都不想要，接受一切

最重要的是，在没有欲望或要求的情况下探索世界，并对发生的任何事情保持宽容。 大多数人都很友善，甚至其他人也教我们。 当你什么都不想要的时候，你就不会失望。 当你接受一切的时候，你就会在每一刻看到美丽。
